device_info.description: Identify your device for Home Assistant. All pins will be grouped under this device in the Device Registry.

connection.title: Testing Connection
connection.description: Please wait while we test the connection and discover pins

pin_selection.title: Pin Configuration
pin_selection.description: Select pins to enable and configure their types. Current values are shown for reference.

Configure settings for pin {pin_number}
Current value: {current_value}

data_description.pin_name: Friendly name for this pin in Home Assistant
data_description.device_class: Device class for proper icon and unit handling
data_description.min: Minimum allowed value for this input
data_description.max: Maximum allowed value for this input
data_description.mode: How to display the input (slider for visual, box for numeric)
data_description.select_values: Raw values sent to Blynk, in the same order as labels
data_description.select_options: Friendly labels shown in Home Assistant, in the same order as raw values
